mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plate_whitelist (plate_number, owner_id, space_id, is_active) VALUES (#{plateNumber}, #{ownerId}, #{spaceId}, #{isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plate_whitelist ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM plate_whitelist WHERE plate_number = #{plateNumber} AND is_active = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE plate_whitelist SET is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
